title: Structure Effects
description: Adventure mode in structures, positive or negative effects in structures, decreasing or increasing attributes in structures.
body:
The Structural Effects mod introduces unique features that change the dynamics of Minecraft. When players find themselves inside certain structures, they enter adventure mode. This opens up a new level of difficulty for players, as they must figure out how to overcome these limitations.

Once out of these structures, players can continue the game using their normal abilities. This makes the game more interesting and dynamic as players have to adapt to changing conditions.

In addition, the Structural Effects mod allows you to add various effects and attributes when entering certain structures. These can be either positive or negative. The list of structures where players will receive effects and attributes is customizable through the data pack, and the list of effects and attributes is customizable through the mod settings. This adds even more depth and complexity to the game, as players should take this into account when planning their actions.
